subject: Projects database schema evolution
fact: The projects database startup path uses `Base.metadata.create_all()` plus additive compatibility migrations in `backend/app/projects_database.py`; existing local SQLite schemas must be evolved there (for example `messages.thread_id`) because Alembic is not what upgrades the runtime `projects.db` on app startup.
reason: Future changes to the projects SQLite schema need to update the additive startup migration path or older local databases will break at runtime even if ORM models are updated.
